# getascraper/how-to-scrape-rapidapi

> RapidAPI Hub Scraper is an Apify Actor that extracts API marketplace listings from RapidAPI Hub. Free tier available.

## Overview
- RapidAPI Hub scraper and public API directory data extraction API
- Extracts: category, pricing model, success rate, latency, subscriptions, developer profile
- Output formats: JSON, CSV, Excel, XML, RSS
- Free tier: included

## Key Pages
- README: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-rapidapi/blob/main/README.md
- Apify Store: https://apify.com/getascraper/rapidapi-scraper
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~rapidapi-scraper
- Source Actor: https://github.com/getascraper/actorstack/tree/main/actors/rapidapi-scraper

## How it works
1. Connects to the RapidAPI Hub and discovers featured and category API listings
2. Applies category, pricing model, popularity, success rate, and latency filters
3. Returns a flat dataset with one row per API, or one row per endpoint with deep scrape enabled

## Target site characteristics
- Public API marketplace listing pages, no login required
- Over 40,000 public APIs across every category
- Global coverage, all categories from Weather to Finance to Sports

## API Usage
- Node.js SDK: https://docs.apify.com/api/client/js
- REST API: https://docs.apify.com/api/v2
- MCP server: https://github.com/apify/apify-mcp-server

## Supported target URLs
- https://rapidapi.com/hub
- https://rapidapi.com/category/{category}
- https://rapidapi.com/collection/{collection-slug}

## Pricing
- Free tier: included, first 50 results of every run
- Paid: $0.79 per 1,000 results

## Output schema (highlights)
- category: primary category on RapidAPI Hub
- pricing_model: FREE, FREEMIUM, or PAID
- success_rate_percent: average success rate percentage
- latency_ms: average response latency in milliseconds
- subscriptions_count: number of active subscribers
- developer_name: full display name of the developer

## Use cases
- SaaS founders scouting undersaturated API categories before building
- Competitive researchers tracking popularity and subscriber counts over time
- Integration developers auditing latency and reliability before subscribing

## Support
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-rapidapi/issues
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~rapidapi-scraper/issues
